ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 50K, 100K, 200K) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event */,
  "distance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of distance (e.g., kilometers, miles) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed for the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "distance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of distance (e.g., kilometers, miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the participant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the participant */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group of the participant */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Gender of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being registered for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant registering */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for registration */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant */,
  "overall_place" INTEGER /* Overall place of the participant */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the participant */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finish position of the participant */,
  "age_group_place" INTEGER /* Place within the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Gender associated with the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ultrasignup" (
  "ultrasignup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UltraSignup entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "ultrasignup_url" TEXT /* UltraSignup URL of the participant */,
  "ultrasignup_status" TEXT /* Status of the UltraSignup entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ultrasignup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ultrasignup_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note for the participant */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., medical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, event organizer, participant) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event staff */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff (e.g., event organizer, volunteer) */,
  "staff_type" TEXT /* Type of staff (e.g., event organizer, volunteer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_staff_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_staff_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer */,
  "volunteer_type" TEXT /* Type of volunteer (e.g., course marshal, aid station) */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the volunteer's shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the volunteer's shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the message */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
